# Invert

`modifier.invert` · Adjust · Mask-aware

Flips the height layer (1 - height).

## Purpose

*Not yet written.*

## Inputs

- `in`

## Outputs

- `out`

## Parameters

This node has no parameters.

## Layer contract

Honours a mask on its input, applying everywhere the mask is absent.
